topic.what: Early comprehensive GI textbook with influential gastritis classification from the pre-biopsy era.
topic.how: Clinical and early endoscopic synthesis of gastritis knowledge.
topic.why_matters: Benchmark for pre-biopsy era gastritis understanding — shows what was known before histology and H. pylori transformed the field.

characteristics.what_it_measures: How well it represents its era's knowledge

good_for: Historical baseline for GI knowledge evolution

novelty: One of earliest comprehensive GI subspecialty textbooks
open_problems: Pre-dates H. pylori, modern biopsy, and PPI era
